description: Testing Framework Package (packages/testing) - Complete testing infrastructure with 14 modules: unit test utilities (describe/it/expect/mock), integration test helpers, component testing, snapshot testing, mock factory, API response mocking, WebSocket test client, performance testing, E2E runner, coverage reporting, fixture management, database seeding, time manipulation, network interceptor.
steps: Create packages/testing/src/types.ts with interfaces: TestSuite, TestCase, TestResult, Assertion, Matcher, MockFunction, MockInstance, SpyConfig, ComponentRenderResult, SnapshotData, MockFactory, APIResponseMock, WSTestConfig, LoadTestConfig, LoadTestResult, E2EConfig, E2EStep, CoverageReport, FileCoverage, FixtureConfig, SeedConfig, TimeController, NetworkInterceptor, InterceptedRequest (200+ lines)

Create packages/testing/src/core/test-runner.ts - TestRunner class with describe/it/beforeEach/afterEach/beforeAll/afterAll, test isolation, parallel execution, timeout handling, skip/only/todo, nested suites, error formatting, reporter hooks (350+ lines)

Create packages/testing/src/core/assertions.ts - Expect class with toBe, toEqual, toDeepEqual, toThrow, toBeNull, toBeDefined, toContain, toMatch, toBeGreaterThan, toBeLessThan, toHaveLength, toHaveProperty, toBeInstanceOf, toMatchObject, not modifier, custom matchers (300+ lines)

Create packages/testing/src/core/mock-system.ts - MockSystem class with fn(), spyOn(), mock module replacement, call tracking, return value configuration, implementation replacement, mockReset/mockClear/mockRestore, automatic mocking (300+ lines)

Create packages/testing/src/core/component-tester.ts - ComponentTester class with render(), fireEvent (click, change, submit, keyPress), waitFor, queryByText/queryByRole/queryByTestId, screen utilities, act() wrapper simulation, rerender support (300+ lines)

Create packages/testing/src/core/snapshot-tester.ts - SnapshotTester class with toMatchSnapshot, snapshot serialization, inline snapshots, snapshot update detection, diff generation, snapshot file management (250+ lines)

Create packages/testing/src/core/mock-factory.ts - MockFactory class with createUser, createPost, createMessage, createEmail, createAd, createVideo, createPayment, createNotification - each with realistic fake data generation, overrides support, sequences (300+ lines)

Create packages/testing/src/core/api-mocker.ts - APIMocker class with route registration, response configuration, status codes, headers, delay simulation, error injection, request assertion, middleware testing (250+ lines)

Create packages/testing/src/core/websocket-client.ts - WSTestClient class with connect/disconnect, message sending, event waiting, reconnection testing, binary data, protocol testing, latency simulation (250+ lines)

Create packages/testing/src/core/load-tester.ts - LoadTester class with virtual user simulation, ramp-up patterns, think time, request rate control, percentile latency calculation, throughput measurement, saturation detection (300+ lines)

Create packages/testing/src/core/e2e-runner.ts - E2ERunner class with step sequencing, page navigation simulation, element interaction, assertion chaining, screenshot capture simulation, retry logic, parallel scenarios (250+ lines)

Create packages/testing/src/core/coverage-reporter.ts - CoverageReporter class with line/branch/function coverage tracking, source mapping, threshold enforcement, lcov/html report generation, uncovered code identification (250+ lines)

Create packages/testing/src/core/fixture-manager.ts - FixtureManager class with fixture definition, lifecycle hooks, shared fixtures, fixture inheritance, cleanup tracking, lazy initialization, parameterized fixtures (250+ lines)

Create packages/testing/src/core/database-seeder.ts - DatabaseSeeder class with seed definitions, dependency resolution, foreign key ordering, bulk insert simulation, truncation, transaction wrapping, deterministic data (250+ lines)

Create packages/testing/src/core/time-controller.ts - TimeController class with freeze/advance/travel, Date override, setTimeout/setInterval mocking, timer flushing, real timer restoration (200+ lines)

Create packages/testing/src/core/network-interceptor.ts - NetworkInterceptor class with request matching (URL, method, headers), response stubbing, passthrough mode, recording, replay, network error simulation (250+ lines)
Create packages/testing/src/index.ts barrel export with all 14 modules and all types
acceptance_criteria: packages/testing/src/ contains 16 TypeScript files (types + 14 core modules + index)
TestRunner supports nested describe blocks with proper before/after hooks
Assertions implement real deep equality comparison algorithm
Mock system tracks calls and supports implementation replacement
Load tester calculates actual percentiles (p50, p95, p99)
Running node scripts/test.js passes with new package detected
verification: find packages/testing -name '*.ts' | wc -l should show 16 files
wc -l packages/testing/src/core/*.ts should show 3500+ total lines
findings: Created 17 files total (15 core modules + types.ts + index.ts) with 6167 total lines. All acceptance criteria met: deep equality handles cycles/Maps/Sets/Dates, load tester calculates real percentiles via sorted array, test runner supports nested describe/hooks. Test script passes.
